assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md lines 25-31 show a table with all four required sections (Issue Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) marked 'YES' for 'Found in Bug?'. Heading formats are listed as '### **Issue Description**', '### **Steps to Reproduce**', '### **Expected Result**', '### **Actual Result**'. Parsed content for all four sections is shown in lines 37-66.

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md lines 17-19: 'Issue type ID from bug issue: **10020** (Bug)' / 'Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration: **10020**' / 'Match: **YES** -- confirmed this is a valid Bug issue'.

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md line 53: 'Root Issue: `line[3:]` does not call `.strip()` or `.rstrip()` to remove trailing whitespace from the extracted heading text.' Lines 28-33 trace the code showing `line[3:]` extracts '"Migration Patterns  "' with trailing spaces preserved, causing the exact-match lookup to fail.

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md: WHAT -- line 5: 'heading extraction uses `line[3:]`...does not strip trailing whitespace'; WHERE -- lines 8-9: 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md -- convention conformance analysis section, heading extraction logic'; HOW TO VERIFY -- lines 19-24: reproducer strategy with trailing whitespace fixture and assertions including 'Assert that the extracted section name equals "Migration Patterns" (without trailing whitespace)'.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 51 (first Acceptance Criteria item): '- [ ] Reproducer test: a `CONVENTIONS.md` fixture with trailing whitespace on heading `## Migration Patterns  ` is correctly parsed, and the extracted section name equals "Migration Patterns" (no trailing spaces)'. This precedes fix criteria on lines 52-55.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 58 (first Test Requirements item): '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a `CONVENTIONS.md` fixture with trailing whitespace on the heading `## Migration Patterns  ` and verify the convention is extracted with key `"Migration Patterns"` (stripped)'. Explicit assertion guidance is present ('verify the convention is extracted with key "Migration Patterns" (stripped)') and derived from Steps to Reproduce (the trailing whitespace on '## Migration Patterns  ' heading).

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 67-80: '## Bug Context' section contains: Bug Key 'ACME-500' (line 69), Steps to Reproduce with 3 numbered steps (lines 70-76), Expected Result (line 78), Actual Result (line 79), and Root Cause summary (line 80: 'Heading extraction uses `line[3:]` without `.strip()`, preserving trailing whitespace in the dictionary key.').

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 9-10: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 1-4: '<!-- Jira API: jira.create_issue -->' / '<!-- project: ACME -->' / '<!-- issue_type: Task -->' / '<!-- labels: ["ai-generated-jira"] -->'. The label 'ai-generated-jira' is present in the metadata block targeting jira.create_issue.
